text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day Curren Chan starts seriously
training for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is a top sprinter, and her strength
shines brightest at 1,200 meters.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: How'd I do? I ran as fast as I could!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Keep the praise coming!
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to seeing you grow!
I'm looking forward to seeing you grow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she really continues to work hard at sprints, I'm
sure she could be a top-level sprinter. But...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I need a pic to commemorate the occasion! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Take it for me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Take it for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Send it to me, okay? I wanna upload it to
Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"My real training starts now! #DoMyBest
#CheerForMe #CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The key is figuring out how to handle this social
media queen who has mastered the art of making
everyone march to the beat of her drum.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Curren! She really is a cutie!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Hey, she's training. You shouldn't bother her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha! It's okay! Thanks for saying hi! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yay! You said hi back! But aren't we disturbing
your training?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! I'm almost done for the day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's my first day, so we just wanted to do some
basics and see where I'm at. Right, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's my first day, so we just wanted to do some
basics and see where I'm at. Right, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See? No problem. Ask me anything you want. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Squeal! Thank you! I-I always look at your Umastagram, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to have a meeting about her future
plans, but with the fans here looking so happy, I
suppose it will have to wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of this, I tell Curren Chan a few days
later that I have something important to talk to
her about. However...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Here you go! Our brand new Mega Fluffy French
Toast!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's heeere! It's exactly what I wanted! It's so
cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
A selfie with aaall this whipped cream is gonna
look so good. I just know it'll be a big hit, so I had
to get my hands on one!
choice_data_list: That's why you wanted to come here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You said you wanted to talk about something
important, but you didn't say it was a secret or
anything, so I figured it'd be okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try not to pay any mind to our surroundings. In
order to decide how we tackle the future, the first
thing we need to discuss is...
choice_data_list: I'd like to know what your dream is.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sure! I want everyone to know about Cute
Curren! ♪
choice_data_list:
I-I was thinking more along the lines of a racing
goal...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a racing goal? Hmmm... I don't really have
one!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't look so surprised! Your eyes look like
they're gonna pop out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... there is something I'm kinda interested
in.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara sounds really fancy and cute.
Don't you think it would suit me perfectly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Runners have to win three particular G1
races—the Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the
Shuka Sho—in order to claim the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a huge honor, but the shortest race, the Oka
Sho, is still 1,600 meters. That's pretty tough for
a sprinter like Curren.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell her as much.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
For now, maybe we just see how much we can
increase my distance?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We've only just started training, so I think it's too
early to decide what direction I should go in.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm great with 1,200 meters, so next is 1,400. If I
can do that, then we can move up to 1,600 and
just keep extending little by little. Whaddya
think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we do as she says and get results, we might be
able to try the Triple Tiara. Plus—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If we're gonna go for it, we may as well go big. ♪
Wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If we're gonna go for it, we may as well go big. ♪
Wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
—if she has a dream, I want to do my best to
support her as her trainer!
choice_data_list: Okay. Let's see how things go.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ We got this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ We got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan seems to be really motivated. I try to
ask her about a short-term plan, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, Big Bro. ♪ Squeeze in and say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, Big Sis. ♪ Squeeze in and say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click! Click, click, click!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That's not a very good angle. Let's try it
again, but put your hand on your cheek like this...
Cute! Stay right where you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That's not a very good angle. Let's try it
again, but put your hand on your cheek like this...
Cute! Stay right where you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, she takes over the rest of the
meeting! My days of chasing cuteness with Curren
Chan begin here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#MegaFluffyFrenchToast #with
#CuteCurrenChan #and #MyTrainer ♪"
